channel.title: Bedroom Studio Brief
channel.description: Fresh takes for bedroom producers and podcasters.

item.title: The mixing checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified mixing purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of treatment
item.description: The most common early stumbles in treatment, and the cheap corrections that fix them for bedroom producers and podcasters.

item.title: "vocal chain basics" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about vocal chain basics through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your vocals questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the vocals questions bedroom producers and podcasters keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in mixing with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest mixing adjustments that bedroom producers and podcasters report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: vocal chain basics
item.description: The persistent myths around vocal chain basics, stress-tested against what bedroom producers and podcasters actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your interfaces in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying interfaces project for bedroom producers — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/audioengineering is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the vocals community this week.
